mapper.sql: PId, Code, ProdCountry_Code, Description, FullName, FileName, PriceTerm, InvNO, UpdDate, Company_Code_Db81, CounTry_Code_Db81, Currency_Type, Fee_Initial, Fee_Add, EmailAddr, InvoiceNo_max, Remaek, Foreigncurrency_flag, FinanceName
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.dbo_Tbl_CustProperty
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.dbo_Tbl_CustProperty (PId, Code, ProdCountry_Code, Description, FullName, FileName, PriceTerm, InvNO, UpdDate, Company_Code_Db81, CounTry_Code_Db81, Currency_Type, Fee_Initial, Fee_Add, EmailAddr, InvoiceNo_max, Remaek, Foreigncurrency_flag, FinanceName) values (#{pid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{prodcountryCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{fullname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{filename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{priceterm,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{invno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{companyCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{countryCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{currencyType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{feeInitial,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{feeAdd,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{emailaddr,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{invoicenoMax,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remaek,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{foreigncurrencyFlag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{financename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.dbo_Tbl_CustProperty

Code,
ProdCountry_Code,
Description,
FullName,
FileName,
PriceTerm,
InvNO,

Company_Code_Db81,
CounTry_Code_Db81,
Currency_Type,

Fee_Add,

InvoiceNo_max,

Foreigncurrency_flag,
FinanceName,

mapper.update:
update dbo.dbo_Tbl_CustProperty
PId = #{record.pid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Code = #{record.code,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ProdCountry_Code = #{record.prodcountryCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Description = #{record.description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
FullName = #{record.fullname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
FileName = #{record.filename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
PriceTerm = #{record.priceterm,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
InvNO = #{record.invno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Company_Code_Db81 = #{record.companyCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CounTry_Code_Db81 = #{record.countryCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Currency_Type = #{record.currencyType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Fee_Initial = #{record.feeInitial,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Fee_Add = #{record.feeAdd,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EmailAddr = #{record.emailaddr,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
InvoiceNo_max = #{record.invoicenoMax,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Remaek = #{record.remaek,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Foreigncurrency_flag = #{record.foreigncurrencyFlag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
FinanceName = #{record.financename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.dbo_Tbl_CustProperty set PId = #{record.pid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Code = #{record.code,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ProdCountry_Code = #{record.prodcountryCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Description = #{record.description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, FullName = #{record.fullname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, FileName = #{record.filename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, PriceTerm = #{record.priceterm,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, InvNO = #{record.invno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Company_Code_Db81 = #{record.companyCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CounTry_Code_Db81 = #{record.countryCodeDb81,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Currency_Type = #{record.currencyType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Fee_Initial = #{record.feeInitial,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Fee_Add = #{record.feeAdd,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EmailAddr = #{record.emailaddr,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, InvoiceNo_max = #{record.invoicenoMax,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Remaek = #{record.remaek,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Foreigncurrency_flag = #{record.foreigncurrencyFlag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, FinanceName = #{record.financename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
